data.title: Listening to the Qin (Zither)
data.medium: Album leaf; ink and slight color on silk
data.description: Listening to the Qin recalls the story of Bo Ya, a musician who loved to play the qin (a seven-stringed zither) for Zhong Ziqi, who was a discerning listener.
